usage.upgradeCta: Upgrade to PRO for unlimited everything

title.pro: Unlock analytics, multilingual menus, and allergen info.

subtitle.starter: Go beyond the Free tier with unlimited items and a branded menu.
subtitle.pro: Everything you need to run a professional menu operation.

starter.three: Promotions, custom logo and brand colors

pro.one: Real-time analytics — views, scans, conversion by item
pro.two: Menus in 3 languages (KA · EN · RU) with auto-translate
pro.three: Allergens, diet badges and QR code with your logo

form.name: Menu Name
form.slugHelp: This will be used in the menu URL: /m/{slug}

delete.title: Delete Menu
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this menu? This action cannot be undone.

url.label: Menu URL
url.helper: The public address for this menu. Used in the QR code.
url.warning: Changing the URL will break any printed QR codes pointing to the old address.

errors.tooShort: Slug must be at least 3 characters
errors.tooLong: Slug must be less than 50 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
errors.taken: This URL is already taken. Try a different one.

published.title: Published
published.body: Visible to everyone who has the URL or scans the QR code.

password.title: Password protected
password.body: Only visitors who enter the password can view this menu.
password.placeholderChange: Leave blank to keep current password
password.hint: A password is already set. Leave blank to keep it.

errors.required: A password is required to enable password protection
errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters

draft.title: Private draft
draft.body: Only you and your team can preview. Customers see "Menu not available."

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.helper: Optional — automatically publish or unpublish on a date. Useful for seasonal menus.
schedule.autoPublishBody: Queue this menu to go live at a specific time.
schedule.autoUnpublishBody: Good for seasonal menus like "Summer brunch".

seo.label: SEO & sharing
seo.helper: How this menu previews when shared on WhatsApp, Instagram or Facebook.
seo.metaTitleHint: Falls back to menu name if left blank.
seo.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Small-batch coffee, khachapuri, and seasonal brunch on Rustaveli Avenue. Open daily.
seo.previewHint: Rendered by WhatsApp, Instagram, iMessage and most apps using Open Graph tags.
seo.fallbackDescription: View our digital menu — scan the QR code or visit the link.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.helper: Clone, archive, or permanently delete this menu.
advanced.cloneError: Could not clone menu. Please try again.
advanced.archiveError: Could not archive menu. Please try again.
advanced.deleteDescription: All items, categories, and QR-code traffic history for {name} are deleted immediately. This can't be undone.
advanced.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete {name} and all its categories, products, and analytics. This action cannot be undone.
advanced.deleteError: Could not delete menu. Please try again.

autoTranslate.title: Auto-translate missing
autoTranslate.hint: {count, plural, =0 {No missing translations 🎉} one {Fill in # missing translation across EN and RU using DeepL.} other {Fill in # missing translations across EN and RU using DeepL.}}
autoTranslate.hintLocked: Auto-translate is a PRO feature. Fills in missing translations using DeepL, reviewed before publish.
autoTranslate.cta: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing to translate} one {Translate # missing} other {Translate # missing}}

matrix.title: Translation status
matrix.coverage: {translated, plural, =0 {0 of {total} fields translated} one {# of {total} field translated} other {# of {total} fields translated}}
matrix.missing: {count, plural, =0 {all covered} one {# missing} other {# missing}}
matrix.empty: Add categories and products in the Content tab to see their translation status here.
matrix.filteredEmpty: Nothing missing — every enabled language has a value.

locked.title: Multilingual is a PRO feature
locked.body: Georgian (KA) is always on. Upgrade to PRO to enable English and Russian, plus auto-translate missing fields with DeepL.

locked.title: Custom branding is a paid feature
locked.body: Upload your logo, pick brand colors and fonts. Included in STARTER from 29₾/month.

variations.title: Variations coming soon
variations.body: Create size or option variations (Small / Medium / Large) so customers can pick one when viewing the product.

allergensCreate.title: Save the product first
allergensCreate.body: Allergens and dietary badges can be set once the product exists. Fill in the Basics tab and save — then come back here.

nutrition.title: Nutrition coming soon
nutrition.body: Add calories and macros (protein, fats, carbs, fiber) so guests can browse with confidence.

visibility.title: Visibility coming soon
visibility.body: Schedule when this product appears on the public menu (lunch, weekends, holidays).
